reviews.comment:
Paramos hacer combu en ésta ypf, muchisimo tráfico, nos encontramos con la avenida cortada por poda de árboles, así que aprovechamos para ir al baño, bueno hay que mejorar la limpieza, por suerte nos tocó un día nublado, muy a pesar de éso el calor se siente igual, en santiago del estero...

(Translated by Google)
We stopped to get fuel at this YPF station. There was a lot of traffic. We found the avenue closed due to tree pruning, so we took advantage of it to go to the bathroom. Well, we need to improve the cleanliness. Luckily, it was a cloudy day. Despite that, the heat is still felt in Santiago del Estero...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15333153301133697225/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtdU4tdDVRRRAB
